# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prebuild
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR: "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/ci-scripts"
  BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR: "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/build"
  ARTIFACTS_DIR: "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/artifacts"
  ALLOW_FAILURE_ON_CUSTOM_SCRIPTS: "false"

.shared_runner_config:
  tags:
    - shared
  interruptible: true

.custom_script_template:
  extends: .shared_runner_config
  before_script:
    - echo "Running custom script from repository"
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}
    - mkdir -p ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
  allow_failure: false

prebuild:custom:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: prebuild
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom prebuild script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.sh
      else
        echo "No custom prebuild script found, skipping"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/
    expire_in: 1 hour
    when: always

build:custom:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.py" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom Python build script"
        python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.py
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.js" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom Node.js build script"
        node ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.js
      else
        echo "No custom build script found"
        exit 1
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/
      - ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/
    expire_in: 1 day
    when: always
  dependencies:
    - prebuild:custom

test:custom:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.py" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom Python test script"
        python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.py
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.js" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom Node.js test script"
        node ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test.js
      else
        echo "No custom test script found, skipping tests"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/test-results/
    reports:
      junit: ${BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR}/test-results/*.xml
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: always
  dependencies:
    - build:custom

package:custom:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: package
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom package script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh
      elif [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.py" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom Python package script"
        python3 ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.py
      else
        echo "No custom package script found, skipping packaging"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/
    expire_in: 1 month
    when: on_success
  dependencies:
    - build:custom
    - test:custom
  only:
    - main
    - master
    - tags
    - /^release\/.*$/

deploy:staging:custom:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy-staging.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom staging deployment script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy-staging.sh
      else
        echo "No custom staging deployment script found, skipping"
      fi
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    on_stop: cleanup:staging
  dependencies:
    - package:custom
  only:
    - main
    - master
  when: manual

deploy:production:custom:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy-production.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom production deployment script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy-production.sh
      else
        echo "No custom production deployment script found"
        exit 1
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
    on_stop: cleanup:production
  dependencies:
    - package:custom
  only:
    - tags
    - /^release\/.*$/
  when: manual

cleanup:staging:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/cleanup-staging.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom staging cleanup script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/cleanup-staging.sh
      else
        echo "No custom staging cleanup script found"
      fi
  environment:
    name: staging
    action: stop
  when: manual
  only:
    - main
    - master

cleanup:production:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/cleanup-production.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom production cleanup script"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/cleanup-production.sh
      else
        echo "No custom production cleanup script found"
      fi
  environment:
    name: production
    action: stop
  when: manual
  only:
    - tags
    - /^release\/.*$/

custom:adhoc:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CUSTOM_SCRIPT_NAME" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom adhoc script: $CUSTOM_SCRIPT_NAME"
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_NAME}" ]; then
          chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_NAME}
          ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_NAME}
        else
          echo "Script ${CUSTOM_SCRIPT_NAME} not found"
          exit 1
        fi
      else
        echo "CUSTOM_SCRIPT_NAME variable not set"
        exit 1
      fi
  when: manual
  allow_failure: true

parallel:custom:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/parallel-${CI_NODE_INDEX}.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing parallel custom script ${CI_NODE_INDEX}"
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/parallel-${CI_NODE_INDEX}.sh
      else
        echo "No parallel script found for node ${CI_NODE_INDEX}"
      fi
  parallel: 3
  when: manual

matrix:custom:
  extends: .custom_script_template
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      echo "Running build with ${BUILD_TOOL} on ${PLATFORM}"
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/matrix-build.sh" ]; then
        export BUILD_TOOL=${BUILD_TOOL}
        export PLATFORM=${PLATFORM}
        ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/matrix-build.sh
      else
        echo "No matrix build script found"
      fi
  parallel:
    matrix:
      - BUILD_TOOL: [maven, gradle, npm]
        PLATFORM: [linux, windows]
  when: manual
  allow_failure: true
